{{Infobox location
| name = Zykaros
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

''See also: [[Zykaros Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Zykaros, also referred to as Zykaros Prime, is a highly industrialized world located within its own namesake star system. The planet is characterized by a toxic atmosphere and oceans, making it an unpleasant place to inhabit; consequently, most [[life]] on the surface is supported by artificial means. To maintain breathable air, massive spinning spires located near major cities filter the smog, with the resulting waste being transported to the edge of the system for treatment. Economically, the world is a manufacturing hub responsible for producing various goods, including starship navigational computers and components for replicators. It is also the home planet of [[Horizon]]'s [[Pilot]] and is associated with [[Omega]]. While its planetary defenses are weaker than those of [[Fathom]], they have faced significant disruption from the [[Zenith]] Starship and a [[Karoshan fleet]] invasion. Zykaros is also the name of a powerful, seemingly immortal entity capable of manipulating the planet's environment. This being can manifest as a humanoid woman, a fifty-foot titan, or even appear within the clouds themselves. Zykaros possesses the ability to form massive planetary shields using [[Aetheric symbols]] and can manipulate clouds and water vapor. Despite being vulnerable to weapons like plasma bolts or the [[Worldslayer]], the entity's physical form is highly unstable, often flickering between solid matter and smog-like vapor.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Zykaros is a dark, smoggy planet within a system believed to be the source of [[Solstice]]'s orders. This industrial junkyard features toxic oceans and a poisonous atmosphere that is purified by twisting spires, though the world remains scarred by a global disaster from the [[Worldslayer]] strike. The planet is home to Zykaros Prime, the birthplace of [[Horizon]]'s [[Pilot]], and contains various government facilities accessible via [[Galactic Union]] ID. As a [[World Spirit]], Zykaros acts as the galaxy's greatest spellcaster, possessing the ability to warp the [[Aether]] and manipulate clouds. This entity can dissolve into billowing hair-like clouds or shift between a humanoid woman and a fifty-foot titan, using a voice that makes bones tremble. Currently, the planet's ground and sky are tearing themselves apart, creating a location from which the narrator must escape.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a location with a [[World Spirit]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zykaros system]] is a sector where [[Solstice]]'s orders are believed to originate.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] Prime is [[Horizon]]'s [[Pilot]]'s home planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a planet that features [[Subline]] news.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a planet shrouded in darkness.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The planet [[Zykaros]] has a toxic atmosphere and oceans.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42">''The Pilot'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Twisting spires on [[Zykaros]] purify the air.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a planet containing [[Lutoch Terelle]]'s apartment.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] ID grants access to all government facilities on [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] can warp the [[Aether]] like a gravity well.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is described as the greatest spellcaster in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is described as a choked industrial junkyard.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] Prime is a location within the [[Zykaros system]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a planet with smoggy skies.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] has planetary defense systems.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a location or entity that can prevent [[Omega]] from leaving.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a location toward which [[Raion]]'s [[Divine Titan]] was falling.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] has an atmosphere.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] has billowing clouds of hair that float like a cape.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] has tombstone teeth.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] can manipulate clouds.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]]' eyes leak smoke.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] can dissolve her body and appear in the clouds.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a [[World Spirit]] whose voice causes bones to tremble.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]]'s human form is unstable and shifts between a fifty-foot-tall titan and a normal humanoid woman.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] is a location the narrator needs to escape.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]] suffered a global disaster from the [[Worldslayer]] strike.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zykaros]]' ground and sky are tearing themselves apart.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“My brother doesn’t like you,” said the World Spirit of Zykaros.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“The greatest spellcaster in the galaxy,” Zykaros went on.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I’m determining that now, but it was someone within range of Zykaros Prime.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
